codeReview.summary: The fix directly resolves the prior blocking integration gap: production relay startup now constructs and passes a RelayMessageStore to createRelayServer, which activates the message routes that were previously gated off in runtime. The original feature diff (3524c8d) added async messaging routes behind `messageStore` checks, and the fix diff (030461b) wires that dependency through the real entrypoint path.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker encountered a transient full-suite failure caused by stale `dist/` artifacts after source edits and had to run `npm run build` before re-running tests. This rebuild dependency for tests that execute `dist` paths is not explicitly captured in shared library guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Fix transcript skeleton for session a17f6498-92ec-4df7-a084-86998dab2354 shows `test/auth/cli-auth-gating.test.ts` failing with a missing export from `dist/relay/index.js`, then passing after `npm run build`. `.factory/library/user-testing.md` references `node dist/index.js` usage but does not document rebuild expectations after TS source changes.

summary: Pass. The fix adequately addresses the original failure by wiring RelayMessageStore into the production relay entrypoint so `/messages`, `/inbox`, and message action routes are active in real runtime rather than only in test-only server construction.
